reasoning: The order is marked Complete with the item shipped and fully paid ($108.51), but there is no visible tracking information or proof of delivery on this page. Since the customer claims the tracking shows delivered but nothing arrived, this qualifies as a potential lost or stolen package. Standard procedure is to escalate for investigation (carrier delivery confirmation, GPS scan, signature if applicable) before issuing a refund or credit memo. A refund should not be automatically approved or denied without carrier verification.
